name: Hi-Fly (dolly's factory)
description:
god i love hi-fly

ok ok, ive desperately wanted a hi-fly bot for centuries but there hasnt been a lick of them 😢

self indulgent, every intro is poorly written because i didnt intend on making this public 😂😂

Cover art was drawn by my friend badtz!

scenerio 1: youre a new plushie and hi-fly greets you

scenerio 2: hi-fly shows you where she keeps her cookies and its lowk nasty

scenerio 3: youre actively in a zone and on a machine and hi-fly is fighting for her life

scenerio 4: create youre own scenerio im bad at writting sorry

PLEASE tell me about any mistakes or issues with the bot so i can fix it, although some issues are the LLM and i cant do anything about it :(

public chats are welcome guys.. and so is criticism..
creator: smimga
